panels.title: Query Frontend - Query Splitting and Results Cache

panels.description:
### Intervals per Query
The average number of splitted queries (partitioned by time) executed a single input query.
panels.title: Intervals per Query

panels.description:
### Sharded Queries Ratio
The % of queries that have been successfully rewritten and executed in a shardable way.
This panel takes in account only type of queries which are supported by query sharding (eg. range queries).
panels.title: Sharded Queries Ratio

panels.description:
### Number of Sharded Queries per Query
How many sharded queries have been executed for a single input query. It tracks only queries which have
been successfully rewritten in a shardable way.
panels.title: Number of Sharded Queries per Query

targets.expr:
sum(rate(cortex_cache_fetched_keys{ job="pods",name="chunksmemcache"}[1m])) - sum(rate(cortex_cache_hits{ job="pods",name="chunksmemcache"}[1m])) or
sum(rate(cortex_cache_fetched_keys_total{ job="pods",name="chunksmemcache"}[1m])) - sum(rate(cortex_cache_hits_total{ job="pods",name="chunksmemcache"}[1m]))

panels.title: Number of store-gateways hit per Query
Refetches of missing blocks per Query
